sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16590" key="a)stragalo/mantis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρᾰγᾰλόμαντις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n16590.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divining from</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀστράγαλοι,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.69</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
